testCases.scenario: streamSink ctx.mode guard at injection point (FR-1/FR-2/AC-1/AC-2)
testCases.steps: 读 extensions/subagent-workflow/src/index.ts 源码，定位 streamSink: ctx.mode === 'rpc' 三元守卫，验证 TUI 下 streamSink=undefined，rpc mode 下注入 setWidget wrapper。
1. mock NotifierHost.sendMessage 捕获调用 2. 构造 BgNotifier.notify(done record) 3. 验证 captured options.deliverAs === 'steer' 且 triggerTurn === true

1. adapter({action:'list', domain}) 返回 content 是数组且第二个 text block 含 'auto-notif'/'do not poll' 2. subagent-actions.ts 源码 BG_MESSAGE 常量含 'auto-injected' 3. subagent-tool.ts description 'After launching' 段含 'auto-injected'

testCases.scenario: subagent-workflow 包 typecheck + unit test 全过 (AC-5/AC-6)
